site.title: ZeroPress Docs Starter
site.description: A compact documentation starter built with ZeroPress.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.content:
## Install

Create your first documentation page and keep content in preview-data or generated Markdown sources.

## Build

Run `zeropress-build` with this theme and preview-data fixture to produce static HTML.
pages.excerpt: Create and build a small ZeroPress documentation site.

pages.title: Theme Runtime
pages.content:
## Templates

ZeroPress themes use `layout.html`, route templates, partials, and theme-owned assets.

## Render Context

Templates receive route data, menus, taxonomies, collections, and site metadata from the build step.
pages.excerpt: A short overview of the ZeroPress theme runtime.
